sections.title: API Limits
sections.current_value: Rate limit: 60 requests/min per API key. Burst: 10 req/sec. Limits enforced at the gateway.

sections.title: Deploy Process
sections.current_value: Deploys go out Tuesdays and Thursdays at 10am PT via the deploy-bot. Rollbacks require an SRE approval.

sections.title: On-call Rotation
sections.current_value: Weekly rotation, handoff Mondays 9am PT. Primary + secondary. Escalation to EM after 15 min unacked.

messages.text: morning all, anyone else seeing elevated 429s on the partner endpoints?
yeah, Acme's integration is hammering us since their launch yesterday
should we bump the rate limit for them? 60/min is clearly not enough anymore
what do other partners at their tier get?
same 60/min, it's global not per-tier
ok let's just raise it globally. bump the rate limit to 100/min, ship it today
on it 👍
lunch anyone?
deployed the limit change, 429s dropping already
hey, deploy-bot failed on my branch twice with a timeout, known issue?
yeah CI runners are flaky today, infra is looking at it
should we consider deploying on Fridays too? backlog is piling up
no, Friday deploys are how we ruin weekends. hard no from me
agreed, keep it Tue/Thu
btw the burst limit — do we keep 10 req/sec with the new 100/min?
hm good question. 100/min with 10/sec burst is fine, leave burst as is
wait actually gateway config rounds to per-second buckets. 100/min means we should set burst to 15/sec or partners will still see 429s on spikes
ok fine — burst goes to 15 req/sec then. update the gateway config
done
team, heads up: I'm out next week, need someone to cover my on-call
I can take it
thanks sam! ❤️
unrelated — anyone have the staging DB password? asking for a friend
tara 😐 use the vault
while we're at it, 15 min unacked before escalation feels too short at night, I keep getting EM pings for blips
propose 30?
let's discuss in the SRE sync tomorrow, not decide here
fair
FYI wrote up the rate limit change in the incident doc
update from the SRE sync: escalation window moves from 15 to 30 minutes unacked, effective next rotation
🎉 my sleep thanks you
deploy-bot question again — who approves rollbacks when no SRE is around?
good gap. decided with infra this morning: rollbacks no longer need SRE approval, any senior eng can approve
nice, that unblocks me
did anyone see the game last night
sam we have #random for a reason
hypothetically if we went to 200/min would the gateway even handle it? just curious
it would, but let's not — 100 is plenty for now
reminder: handoff is Monday 9am as usual, sam you're primary next week
can we also move deploys to 11am? 10am collides with the all-hands on Thursdays
+1, I always miss the deploy window
ok, deploys move to 11am PT starting next week, same Tue/Thu cadence
I'll update the calendar invite
anyone against upgrading node to 24 in the api repo? speak now
go for it
